purpose: Gold-pick fixtures for catalog signature sufficiency (validate_catalog.mjs Tier 2). Each case asserts: GIVEN this user prompt, the listed components' signatures (summary + tags + goodFits) should contain at least one keyword overlap with prompt tokens. Failure means the SIGNATURE is undertelling - a stage-1 picker cannot find this component from surface text alone. Cases include incremental/composite goals (e.g. speed-chess = chess + timer) that the deterministic recipe matcher cannot solve today.

universalComponents._comment: Components that a stage-1 picker should ALWAYS include for a given category (per recipe convention / wisdom rule), regardless of prompt text. The validator verifies they exist in the catalog but skips the prompt-overlap check for them. Add to expectedComponents in cases anyway - the validator de-duplicates against this list.

cases.prompt: build a speed chess game with a 5 minute countdown clock per player and flag-fall
blitz checkers with a 3 minute timer for each player
build an asteroids arcade game with a vector ship, rotation, thrust, bullets, and asteroid splitting
build a pomodoro focus timer with 25 minute focus and 5 minute break cycles
build a wordle clone with five letter answers, six guesses, green yellow gray feedback, and a virtual keyboard
tic tac toe with a turn timer and best of three rounds
build a pong arcade game with two paddles, a ball, and score
